full_description: Open the closed cabinet and identify what colored object is inside.
schema: {A} denotes the hidden object inside the container, {B} denotes the closed container, {a} denotes the arm used to extract the object, {b} denotes the arm used to open the container
preference: Mention that the object identity should be determined only after opening the container.
seen: Open {B} with {b}, take out {A} with {a}, and identify it.
Check that the object is hidden, open the container, then extract {A} to confirm its identity.
Use {b} to open {B}, then lift the colored block out so it can be clearly identified.
Open the cabinet, take out the hidden object, and report its identity.
Look inside {B} after opening it, remove {A}, and identify the object.
unseen: Find out what is inside the closed container.
Open the cabinet and inspect the object inside.
Identify the hidden colored block after opening the container.

seen: confirm {A} is not visible before opening
unseen: look for the hidden object before opening the container

seen: take out {A} with {a} and identify it clearly
unseen: extract the revealed object for confirmation
